text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. Who will be the
victor—Hishi Amazon, or Narita Brian? Or will it
be someone else entirely from the elite lineup?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon gathers her focus with a deep, long
breath. Her long-awaited match with Narita Brian
is finally beginning!
